text:
First, note that time zones in 1669 were not standardized as today, but for this exercise we assume modern time zone offsets for consistency.  

US/Hawaii is UTC-10:00.  
Asia/Tokyo is UTC+09:00.  

Time difference = (UTC+9) − (UTC-10) = 19 hours ahead.  

6:00 + 19 hours = 25:00 → next day 01:00.  

Date in Hawaii: August 18, 1669, 06:00.  
Add 19 hours → August 19, 1669, 01:00 in Tokyo.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1669-08-19 01:00
